overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with a glowing umbrella walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The character transitions from open streets to covered walkways, through an indoor red-lit corridor, and back to wet city streets with reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with yellow crosswalk

events.description: camera perspective shifts from first-person to third-person follow as character approaches sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk toward the covered sidewalk area

notable_agents.action: approaching with a glowing pink umbrella

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes
futuristic pink vehicle parked at the curb
tall buildings with holographic advertisements and neon lighting
suspended traffic signals with red lights visible

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a first-person view crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk in a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk. A pedestrian with a glowing pink umbrella approaches from the opposite direction. Around the 3-second mark, the perspective shifts to third-person follow as the character reaches the sidewalk under an overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under overpass with dynamic colored ceiling panels

events.description: ceiling panels shift from green to yellow and orange hues
ceiling panels transition to deep red and magenta colors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass alongside other pedestrians with glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: walking ahead with a large glowing umbrella and backpack

entered.detail: massive concrete and metal overhead structure with geometric supports
illuminated panels cycling through green, yellow, orange, red, and purple colors
thick structural columns supporting the overpass
building entrance with purple neon Japanese text reading 24-hour business

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive overpass. The ceiling features dynamic colored panels that shift from green to yellow, orange, and finally deep red and magenta. Concrete pillars line the left side while digital billboards and neon signs illuminate the right. The character approaches a building entrance marked with glowing purple Japanese characters indicating 24-hour operation.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor corridor with red neon accent lighting and vending machines

events.description: entering indoor corridor from covered walkway
ascending stairs inside the red-lit corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the red-lit interior corridor, navigating stairs and passing vending machines

notable_agents.action: standing at a vending machine with yellow illuminated screen

entered.detail: interior hallway with dramatic red neon strip lighting along ceiling and walls
row of black vending machines with bright yellow illuminated displays
concrete stairs leading up and then down through the corridor
sleek gray seating with blue accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The character enters an indoor corridor bathed in dramatic red neon light. The space features rows of vending machines with yellow screens on the left and futuristic benches on the right. The character ascends and then descends a short flight of stairs while passing other pedestrians. The corridor has a high-tech industrial aesthetic with exposed ductwork and glowing red accent strips.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city street with spiral staircase and outdoor dining area

events.description: exiting indoor corridor back to outdoor street environment
passing outdoor seating area with red plastic chairs

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet reflective pavement, passing outdoor seating and descending the street

notable_agents.action: walking with a bright green glowing umbrella

entered.detail: futuristic blue-lit spiral staircase structure attached to building
reflective wet concrete surface mirroring the neon lights
casual dining setup with red plastic chairs and tables under an awning
traditional-style white paper lanterns with red symbols

segments.scene_description: The character exits the building back into the open air, revealing a wet street with reflective pavement that mirrors the surrounding neon lights. A prominent blue spiral staircase structure dominates the left side. The character passes an outdoor seating area with red chairs and continues down the street, passing traditional-style paper lanterns and parked vehicles while tall futuristic buildings tower overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open cyberpunk street into a neon-lit interior before emerging back into a rainy urban landscape. It begins as a first-person perspective crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk toward a pedestrian with a glowing pink umbrella, before shifting to a third-person follow as the character moves under a massive overpass. The scene then flows into a covered walkway where the ceiling panels shift through a spectrum of green, orange, and magenta, leading the character toward a building entrance marked with purple Japanese characters. As the character enters, the environment transforms into a dramatic red-lit indoor corridor filled with vending machines and industrial ductwork, where the camera follows them across a short flight of stairs. Finally, the character exits the building back into the open air, moving past a blue spiral staircase and red outdoor seating onto wet, reflective pavement mirrored by towering futuristic buildings and traditional paper lanterns.
